The head is jest so crazy and the severs don't work. The city map. The valentines cosmetics are gone and black. And i can't change my color and name so this is why this game is a 2 star but if, you want to get it you can it's your choise uhm so yeah it's ok. Just try get the severs to work and cosmetics and the head so yeah that's it have a great day and yeah play the game. I will rate it next time bye.
